nasb.text: So Saul said, “Bring to me the burnt offering and the peace offerings.” And he offered the burnt offering.

esv.text: So Saul said, “Bring the burnt offering here to me, and the peace offerings.” And he offered the burnt offering.

cnv.text: 掃羅說：“你們把燔祭和平安祭帶到我這裡來。”他就獻上燔祭。

ccb.text: 于是，扫罗说：“你们把燔祭和平安祭带到我这里来”。他就献上了燔祭。
